name: Milky Way Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 package (3.4 oz) instant vanilla pudding mix
1 package (3.9 oz) instant chocolate fudge pudding mix.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, melt the candy bars with half the cream.
2. Beat the eggs in the remaining cream.
3. Whisk the egg mixture into the melted chocolate.
4. Cook and stir for 5 minutes.
5. Cool.
6. Beat the milk and pudding mixes together.
7. Fold the milk mixture into the chocolate mixture.
8. Chill several hours or overnight.
9. Freeze in an ice cream freezer according to manufacturer's instructions.
Makes about 3 quarts.
